bugs.error_message: errors.Is(err, ErrAuthRequired) returned false for 401 responses
bugs.root_cause: ORAS v2 returns 'basic credential not found' (not 'unauthorized') when auth client has no credentials after 401 challenge. isAuthError only checked for 'unauthorized' and 'authentication required'.
bugs.fix: Added 'credential not found', 'credentials not found', 'status 401', 'status 403' to isAuthError string checks

bugs.root_cause: Code path had no error handling — exceptions would propagate uncaught

bugs.error_message: Namespace dropdown disappears after F5/manual page refresh
bugs.root_cause: loadContexts() only calls restoreContext() (which loads namespaces) when !this.activeContext. On F5, route components call setActiveContext() via $effect before loadContexts() runs (because App.svelte's async IIFE has two awaited RPCs before loadContexts). So activeContext is already set when loadContexts runs, causing it to skip restoreContext and never load namespaces.
bugs.fix: Added else-if branch in loadContexts: when activeContext is already set, still call GetActiveNamespace + loadNamespaces for the active context.

bugs.root_cause: Code path had no error handling — exceptions would propagate uncaught
No early return/throw for edge case: gen !== this.generation

bugs.error_message: After page refresh, namespace selection is ignored — all-namespace resources shown despite a saved namespace
bugs.root_cause: Race condition in ResourceStore.start(): the first call (watchNamespace=empty) is async. By the time ListResources resolves, the $effect has cleaned up (stop()) and restarted with the correct namespace. The stale first call overwrites this.items with all-namespace results and calls StartWatch again.
bugs.fix: Added generation counter. stop() increments it. start() captures gen after stop(), then bails out after any await if gen !== this.generation.
